# Howell Psychiatric Mental Wellness LLC

## About Us
Howell Psychiatric Mental Wellness LLC provides compassionate, comprehensive mental health care, specializing in medication management, telepsychiatry, and psychotherapy. We prioritize individualized, holistic approaches to mental wellness.

## Services
- Comprehensive Psychiatric Evaluations
- Medication Management
- Telehealth Services
- Psychotherapy
- Treatment for: Depression, Anxiety, ADHD, PTSD, Bipolar Disorder, and more.

## Contact Information
